title: AN ACT DECLARING OCTOBER 2 OF EVERY YEAR AN OFFICIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MAJAYJAY, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA AND IN ALL ITS BARANGAYS, TO BE KNOWN AS THE "MAJAYJAY DAY"

chunks.text:
H. No. 3685; 105 OG No. 42, 6223 (October 19, 2009)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9701, August 07, 2009 ]

AN ACT DECLARING OCTOBER 2 OF EVERY YEAR AN OFFICIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MAJAYJAY, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA AND IN ALL ITS BARANGAYS, TO BE KNOWN AS THE "MAJAYJAY DAY"

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. October 2 of every year is hereby declared an official nonworking holiday in the Municipality of Majayjay, Province of Laguna and in all the barangays therein to commemorate the foundation of the municipality, to be known as the "Majayjay Day".

SEC. 2. This Act take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on April 29, 2008 and May 26, 2009, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARAUA-YAP

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

APPROVED: Aug. 07 2009

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

President of the Philippines
